title: hymenochilus wapstrarum
intro: Hymenochilus wapstrarum, also known as the Wapstra's filmy fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its delicate, lacy fronds. The medicinal properties of Hymenochilus wapstrarum include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits are said to include reducing fever and relieving digestive issues.
